title: Explicit Agent State Machine, Progress, Budgets, Termination, and Cancellation · Behavior Case: Step Resource Budgets
summary: A while-true loop stops only when the model chooses text, repeats the same call after unchanged failures, ignores cancellation, and has no terminal reason or partial-result policy. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the step resource budgets increment in bounded observable Python agent loop. Learners progress through prediction, explic…
objectives: Enforce steps, wall time, tokens, model calls, tool calls, retries, bytes, concurrency, and spend before each transition.
Represent observe, request, classify, authorize, approve, execute, record, continue, complete, refuse, fail, cancel, and escalate transitions explicitly.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-step-resource-budgets — Enforce steps, wall time, tokens, model calls, tool calls, retries, bytes, concurrency, and spend before each transition.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-bounded-control-loop-5
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-bounded-control-loop-5.
# Case 9036: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def worked_agentpy_bounded_control_loop_5(step_budget: int = 12, used_steps: int = 7, repeated_call_limit: int = 2, repeated_calls: int = 1, terminal_events: int = 1) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "authorityworked5",
        "interaction9036",
        "tool5dekrow",
        "stateworked59036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
        "recovery5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if step_budget < 1 or used_steps < 0 or used_steps > step_budget:
        return False, used_steps, "step-budget"
    if repeated_calls < 0 or repeated_calls > repeated_call_limit:
        return False, repeated_calls, "loop-stall"
    if terminal_events != 1:
        return False, terminal_events, "terminal-ambiguity"
    if used_steps < 1:
        return False, used_steps, "no-progress"
    assert used_steps <= step_budget and terminal_events == 1
    return True, used_steps, "bounded-agent-loop"
